sections.name: Blog Header
sections.description: Blog article header with category, title, author, date, social share, and hero image

contentSequences.description: Category label ('auto'), H1 title, author photo + name + date + read time, social share icons (Facebook, Email, LinkedIn, Share)
Large hero image of couple at car dealership

sections.name: Article Overview
sections.description: Article overview paragraph with bullet list and an inline image

contentSequences.description: H2 'Article overview', two paragraphs of introductory text, bulleted list of what the article covers
Image of couple shaking hands with car salesperson

sections.name: Quick Checklist
sections.description: Quick car buying checklist with checkmarks for used, new, and both categories

contentSequences.description: H2 'Quick car buying checklist', three checklist items (Used Cars, New Cars, Both) each with checkmark emoji and bold label followed by comma-separated items

sections.name: Used Car Questions
sections.description: Questions to ask when buying a used car with 6 numbered Q&A items and an inline CTA

contentSequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask when buying a used car', introductory paragraph, then 6 numbered H3 questions each with explanatory paragraph. Some questions include bullet lists (e.g., tire/brake/belt inspection tips). Contains inline links to related articles.
Inline call-to-action component with text 'Need some tips on how to trade in your car? We've got a guide for that!' and 'Read More Today' button linking to trade-in guide

sections.name: New Car Questions
sections.description: Questions to ask when buying a new car with 6 numbered Q&A items and image

contentSequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask when buying a new car', introductory paragraph, then 6 numbered H3 questions each with explanatory paragraph. Contains inline links.
Image of car dealer showing customer car engine

sections.name: Financing and Negotiation
sections.description: Questions about financing, loan terms, negotiation tips, and online buying guidance

contentSequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask about financing and loan terms', paragraph, 4 bulleted Q&A items (monthly payment/APR, total ownership cost, recalls, extended test drive). Then H2 'Negotiation and online buying tips', paragraph about strategy.
Inline CTA with text 'Shopping for a new car? Try these three ways to reduce insurance rates.' and 'Read More' button
H2 'Negotiation tips and online car buying questions', H3 subsections for negotiation tips (3 bullet items) and navigating online car buying (3 bullet items), closing paragraphs with advice.

sections.name: Insurance and Final CTA
sections.description: Insurance impact section and prominent end CTA for AAA car buying services

contentSequences.description: Inline CTA: 'AAA-owned Car Care Centers and AAA Approved Auto Repair facilities can provide pre-inspections of used vehicles.' with 'Find a Facility' button
H2 'How will the car affect my insurance rate?', paragraph about insurance factors, 3 bulleted items (sticker price, type of car, safety features), closing paragraph with advice.
Prominent end CTA with eyebrow 'buying a car', H3 title 'Explore car options with a trusted brand – AAA', description paragraph, 'Get Help' button

sections.name: Disclaimer
sections.description: Banking disclosure and legal disclaimer text

contentSequences.description: H4 'Banking Disclosure' followed by legal disclaimer paragraphs about banking products, membership verification, and credit card information

sections.name: Related Articles
sections.description: Related articles section with 3 article cards in a grey background

contentSequences.description: H2 'Other Articles You May Like', grid of 3 article cards each with image, category tag, title, author name and read time

excludedContent: Popup screens (zip code entry, state selection)

blockCollectionAvailable.name: hero
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Large heading, text, and buttons for page introductions

blockCollectionAvailable.name: cards
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Grid of items with images, headings, and descriptions
